roles.desc: Leading programme design, operations, and delivery for a social impact organisation focused on systemic change.
Built a data-driven geo-expansion model to identify the next focus city for Reap Benefit's civic incubation programme across India.
Built the selection model for The Circle's inaugural two-year entrepreneur incubation programme cohort.

roles.role: English Programme Lead · Institute Student Mentorship Programme
roles.desc: Led an English as a Second Language initiative enabling 300+ freshmen from vernacular backgrounds to integrate into IIT-Bombay's English-medium curriculum. One of the earliest things that showed me what systematic, empathetic design can do for people who just need a different kind of support.
